meaning: n.轻打,活栓,水龙头vt.轻打,轻敲,敲打出,开发,分接,使流出,选择,攻螺纹于vi.轻叩,轻拍,轻声走n.<美>(用复数)熄灯号
examples: Is the tap water safe to drink?
A tap in the kitchen was dripping.
Credit controls were lifted in October and banks have been quick to turn on the tap.
